subject: fix(theme): resolve 9 audit findings from full codebase review
body:
Critical fixes:
- C1+C2: FuelMapWeb map layers now update on theme change via
  setPaintProperty() effect. Map init guarded with themeLoaded to
  prevent wrong colors before AsyncStorage hydrates.
- C3: All broken semantic color classes (text-error, bg-success/10,
  border-warning, etc.) replaced with inline styles. Uniwind doesn't
  generate utility classes for @variant-only CSS variables. Added
  withAlpha() utility for consistent hex opacity.

High priority:
- H1: Toast now uses active theme colors instead of hardcoded
  DEFAULT_COMBO — toasts match selected combo.
- H2-H4: Updated CLAUDE.md architecture, USER_GUIDE.md, and
  TESTING_GUIDE.md with theme combo documentation.
- H5: Wrapped Uniwind.setTheme() in try-catch with debug logging.

Medium:
- M1: Created withAlpha(hex, opacity) utility in themeColors.ts,
  replaced 4 fragile hex concatenation sites.
- M2: Runtime validation of hydrated combo from AsyncStorage —
  falls back to DEFAULT_COMBO if corrupted.
- M7: Theme swatch buttons now have minHeight: 44 (WCAG AA).
- M8: Theme changes logged to debug system.
- M10: renderEmptyState wrapped in useCallback.

Tags: theme, audit, quality, accessibility, mapbox, debug
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
Semver: patch

title: resolve 9 audit findings from full codebase review
